protein_name: In T-cells, functions as a regulator of p38 MAPKs by inhibiting p88 phosphorylation and activity. Might affect PCNA interaction with some CDK (cell division protein kinase) complexes; stimulates DNA excision repair in vitro and inhibits entry of cells into S phase. Belongs to the GADD45 family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
